## Feature Request
(Note: the best way to make a feature request is via a PR)

**Description**  
_A clear and concise description of the feature._

**Use Case / Motivation**  
_Why is this feature useful for Astra?_

**Proposed Solution**  
_Optional: how you would like to see it implemented._

**Alternatives**  
_Optional: describe alternatives you've considered._

**Additional Context**  
_Optional: add any other context or references._
